text: Fontana Center - Medical MR - 210505 Joshua James Bergeron. Business records packet and legal wrapper page only.

Date of Service: 07/18/2019. Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick. ER note entry: head, neck, and left shoulder pain after workplace trauma. Head laceration and left periorbital swelling.

Date of Service: 07/18/2019. CT head showed no acute intracranial abnormality. CTA neck showed possible right vertebral artery injury and vascular injury concern. C2 fracture with vertebral foramen extension.
Date of Service: 07/18/2019. Left shoulder and humerus radiographs showed nondisplaced left scapular fracture.
Date of Service: 07/18/2019. CBC and metabolic panel results documented. Urinalysis documented.
Date of Service: 07/18/2019. Medications administered during encounter included hydromorphone, ondansetron, ketorolac, Tdap, and acetaminophen.
Date of Service: 07/18/2019. Orthopedic consultation: sling for comfort, gentle mobilization, follow-up in 1 week.
Date of Service: 07/18/2019. Discharge disposition and follow-up documented. Return precautions reviewed.
